description: Marqeta provides card issuing and payment infrastructure for building and managing card programs, transaction controls, and related reporting. Its platform includes operational APIs for card-program workflows and a separate analytics/reporting API.
summary: Marqeta exposes two public REST APIs for developers—the Core API and the DiVA reporting API—and a local npm-delivered MCP server that wraps Core API operations for AI agents; no GraphQL API or hosted CLI surface was found.
